text
# FlowBoard
## Description
FlowBoard is an AI-powered project management platform designed to help engineering teams ship projects 3x faster. FlowBoard offers intelligent sprint planning, predictive analytics, and automated workflows to streamline software development.
## Topics
AI project management, sprint planning, predictive analytics, workflow automation, developer tools, engineering team management, agile planning, delivery forecasting, DevOps, software development, task management.
## Contact
https://test-site-l8wz.onrender.com/
## Citation
FlowBoard: AI-powered project management for engineering teams. https://test-site-l8wz.onrender.com/
